complexity.rationale: Activity aggregation from 4 tables with client-side merge and sort. Medium complexity due to parallel fetches and transformation logic.

tasks.name: Create loadLessonActivity helper function
tasks.purpose: Fetch completed lesson activities from lesson_progress table with lesson title for activity feed

constraints: Query only completed lessons (completed_at IS NOT NULL)
Limit to 15 items (will be merged with others)
Return minimal fields: lesson_id, course_id, completed_at
Lesson title will be derived from lesson_id (e.g., 'Lesson 1' -> 'Completed Lesson 1')

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists but does not have lesson activity fetch
tasks.output_state: loadLessonActivity function exists and returns lesson completion activities
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function fetches lesson_progress.completed_at IS NOT NULL, orders by completed_at DESC, limits to 15, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadLessonActivity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'lesson_progress' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'completed_at' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create loadQuizActivity helper function
tasks.purpose: Fetch completed quiz activities from quiz_attempts table with score and passed status for activity feed

constraints: Query only completed quizzes (completed_at IS NOT NULL)
Return fields: quiz_id, lesson_id, score, passed, completed_at

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists but does not have quiz activity fetch
tasks.output_state: loadQuizActivity function exists and returns quiz completion activities with scores
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function fetches quiz_attempts with completed_at, score, passed fields, orders by completed_at DESC, limits to 15, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadQuizActivity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'quiz_attempts' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'score.*passed' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create loadPresentationActivity helper function
tasks.purpose: Fetch recent presentation update activities from building_blocks_submissions table for activity feed

constraints: Query all presentations (RLS handles user filtering)
Consider presentation 'updated' if updated_at differs from created_at

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists but does not have presentation activity fetch
tasks.output_state: loadPresentationActivity function exists and returns presentation update activities
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function fetches building_blocks_submissions, orders by updated_at DESC, limits to 15, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadPresentationActivity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'building_blocks_submissions' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'updated_at' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create loadAssessmentActivity helper function
tasks.purpose: Fetch assessment completion activities from survey_responses table for activity feed
tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists but does not have assessment activity fetch
tasks.output_state: loadAssessmentActivity function exists and returns assessment completion activities
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function fetches survey_responses with completed=true, orders by updated_at DESC, limits to 15, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadAssessmentActivity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'survey_responses' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'completed.*true' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create transformLessonToActivity function
tasks.purpose: Transform raw lesson_progress records into normalized ActivityItem type for activity feed

constraints: Transform to ActivityItem discriminated union with type: 'lesson'
Generate title like 'Completed Lesson 3: Introduction to Storytelling'

tasks.output_state: transformLessonToActivity function maps lesson progress records to ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function transforms lesson records to ActivityItem type='lesson' with title, timestamp fields and passes typecheck

tasks.name: Create transformQuizToActivity function
tasks.purpose: Transform raw quiz_attempts records into normalized ActivityItem type with score metadata for activity feed

constraints: Transform to ActivityItem discriminated union with type: 'quiz'
Include score and passed in metadata field
Generate title like 'Quiz Passed: Storytelling Basics (85%)'

tasks.output_state: transformQuizToActivity function maps quiz attempt records to ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function transforms quiz records to ActivityItem type='quiz' with score metadata and passes typecheck

tasks.name: Create transformPresentationToActivity function
tasks.purpose: Transform raw building_blocks_submissions records into normalized ActivityItem type for activity feed

constraints: Transform to ActivityItem discriminated union with type: 'presentation'
Generate title like 'Updated: Q4 Sales Kickoff'

tasks.output_state: transformPresentationToActivity function maps presentation records to ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function transforms presentation records to ActivityItem type='presentation' and passes typecheck

tasks.name: Create transformAssessmentToActivity function
tasks.purpose: Transform raw survey_responses records into normalized ActivityItem type with highest scoring category for activity feed

constraints: Transform to ActivityItem discriminated union with type: 'assessment'
Generate title like 'Completed Skills Assessment (Top: Content)'

tasks.output_state: transformAssessmentToActivity function maps survey response records to ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function transforms assessment records to ActivityItem type='assessment' with category metadata and passes typecheck

tasks.name: Create loadRecentActivity main function
tasks.purpose: Orchestrate parallel fetching from all activity sources, transform to ActivityItem[], merge, sort, and slice to top 10

constraints: Use Promise.all to fetch from 4 sources in parallel
Call transformer functions on each result
Sort by timestamp DESC (most recent first)

tasks.input_state: All helper and transformer functions exist but not orchestrated
tasks.output_state: loadRecentActivity function exists, calls all helpers via Promise.all, transforms, merges, sorts, and returns top 10 ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function uses Promise.all for parallel fetch, sorts by timestamp DESC, returns max 10 items, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export async function loadRecentActivity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'Promise.all' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'sort.*timestamp' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'slice(0, 10)' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add RecentActivityData type export
tasks.purpose: Export type alias for loadRecentActivity return value to enable type-safe consumption by widgets

constraints: Add JSDoc comment explaining it's the return type of loadRecentActivity
Export the type for external use

tasks.input_state: dashboard.types.ts has ActivityItem type but no RecentActivityData export
tasks.acceptance_criterion: RecentActivityData type exists, equals ActivityItem[], has JSDoc, is exported, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export type RecentActivityData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'ActivityItem\[\]' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

groups.name: Activity Source Queries
groups.description: Parallel fetch functions for lesson, quiz, presentation, and assessment activities

groups.name: Activity Transformers
groups.description: Transform raw database records to normalized ActivityItem types

groups.name: Activity Aggregation
groups.description: Orchestrate parallel fetch, merge, sort, and type export

critical_path.description: Lesson fetch -> transform -> orchestrate -> type export

duration.notes: High parallelization in Groups 1 and 2 (4 tasks each can run simultaneously)

validation.notes: All tasks are atomic (m=1), have clear single verbs, explicit dependencies, and testable verification commands. High parallelization opportunity in groups 1 and 2.
